title: Solar twins in Gaia DR3 GSP-Spec II. Age distribution and its implications for the Sun's migration
comment: 8 pages (main text 4 pages), 2+9 figures. Published in A&A
summary: Solar twins are among the most powerful tracers of Galactic disk evolution owing to their unique property of sharing nearly solar metallicities ([Fe/H] ~ 0) while spanning a wide range of ages. To grasp solar twins as relics of Galaxy evolution, individual twins must be tagged with ages. A sufficiently large and well-characterized stellar sample then allows us to construct an age distribution that encodes the star formation history beyond our local region, modulated by the efficiency of radial migration of stars. Based on our catalog of 6,594 high-quality local (<~ 300 pc) solar twins from the Gaia Data Release 3 spectroscopic (GSP-Spec) catalog, we derived their age distribution after carefully deconvolving the selection function. We find two distinct features: a narrow peak around ~ 2 Gyr and a broad bump extending over ~ 4--6 Gyr. First, we argue that the former corresponds to a relatively recent burst of star formation that occurred in the disk, including at least a local region within a few kiloparsecs of the Sun, which is in good agreement with previous results deduced from independent works. On the other hand, the older bump, closely associated with the Sun's birth epoch, is intriguing since this finding challenges the predicted presence of a corotation barrier built by the Galactic bar, which is thought to prevent stars born inside R_GC ~ 6 kpc from reaching the solar neighborhood. We propose that the large number of local twins with ages between 4 and 6 Gyr provides compelling evidence that the Sun's long-distance (>= 3 kpc) migration is shared by many inner disk stars. This, in turn, suggests a possible link with the epoch of bar formation, which may have triggered enhanced star formation in the inner disk and induced efficient radial migration.

AI.tldr: 基于盖亚(Gaia)数据对6594颗高质量本地太阳相似星(solar twins)的年龄分布分析发现，2 Gyr处的窄峰对应近期恒星形成爆发，4-6 Gyr的宽峰表明大量内盘恒星与太阳经历了长距离(≥3 kpc)迁移，挑战了银河系棒结构形成的共转屏障(corotation barrier)理论预测。
AI.background: 太阳相似体（solar twins）因其与太阳相似的金属丰度（[Fe/H] ~ 0）且年龄分布广泛，成为研究银河系盘演化的重要示踪体。
AI.data: 数据来源于盖亚卫星第三次数据发布（Gaia Data Release 3）的光谱（GSP-Spec）目录中筛选出的6,594颗高质量局部（距离≤300秒差距）太阳相似星样本。
AI.method: 基于盖亚卫星第三次数据发布（Gaia DR3）光谱（GSP-Spec）目录中的6594颗高质量本地（约300秒差距内）太阳相似星样本，通过仔细解卷积选择函数推导其年龄分布。
AI.result: 年龄分布呈现两个显著特征：约2 Gyr处的窄峰和4-6 Gyr范围的宽峰，前者对应近期盘星爆发事件，后者暗示太阳与众多内盘恒星经历长距离迁移并与棒结构形成时期相关。

title: GSE vs. LMC: reshaping of radially biased stellar haloes by satellites
summary: Perturbations from the Large Magellanic Cloud (LMC) of the Milky Way's stellar and dark matter haloes are well-established. However, studies have generally not considered haloes with high radial anisotropy, like debris from the Gaia Sausage-Enceladus (GSE) in the Milky Way. We run a series of test particle simulations of stellar haloes with different velocity anisotropies $β\in[0.5,0.9]$. The LMC causes these initially axisymmetric haloes to become approximately triaxial. Their major axes are aligned with its orbital plane and tilted by up to $\sim14^\circ$ with respect to a fixed Galactic disc. These effects become much more dramatic as $β$ increases, causing the halo to fractionate spatially according to anisotropy. This confirms the expectations of an analytical model, which predicts that orbits with eccentricities $e\gtrsim0.95$ should azimuthally align with the tidal field of the LMC. The reshaping of the $β=0.9$ halo creates strong overdensities of $\sim40\%$ at heliocentric distances as close as 15 kpc. These coincide with the well-known Virgo Overdensity (VOD) and Hercules-Aquila Cloud (HAC), which have previously been associated with the GSE. We propose that the HAC and VOD were created by the dynamical alignment of highly eccentric orbits by the LMC, and are not necessarily relics of the GSE merger geometry. We conclude that previous works have significantly underestimated perturbations from the LMC in the inner stellar halo by not considering sufficiently high velocity anisotropy. This effect should be corrected for when constructing equilibrium models of the GSE.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大麦哲伦云（LMC）对高径向速度各向异性（β≥0.5）的银河系恒星晕（包括盖亚香肠-恩克拉多斯遗迹GSE）产生显著扰动，导致其形态从轴对称变为近似三轴且主轴向LMC轨道面倾斜达14°，并在15千秒差距内形成与室女座超密度区（VOD）和武仙-天鹰云（HAC）重合的40%强密度扰动，证实这些结构源于LMC对高偏心率轨道的动力学扰动而非GSE合并遗迹。
AI.background: 研究探讨了大麦哲伦云(LMC)对银河系恒星晕和暗物质晕的动力学扰动效应，特别关注了高径向速度各向异性(如盖亚香肠-恩克拉多斯(GSE)遗迹)对扰动响应的放大作用。
AI.data: data：研究使用了一系列测试粒子模拟（test particle simulations）数据，模拟了速度各向异性（velocity anisotropy）参数β在0.5至0.9范围内的银河系恒星晕（stellar halo）。
AI.method: 采用测试粒子模拟(test particle simulations)分析不同速度各向异性(velocity anisotropy)参数β∈[0.5,0.9]的恒星晕在LMC扰动下的动力学响应，并通过解析模型(analytical model)验证高偏心率(eccentricity)轨道与LMC潮汐场的方位角对齐效应。
AI.result: 大麦哲伦云（LMC）对银河系恒星晕和暗物质晕的扰动会导致高径向速度各向异性（β≥0.5）的晕从初始轴对称变为近似三轴形态，其长轴与LMC轨道平面对齐且相对固定银盘倾斜达14°，且β越高效应越显著，在日心距15 kpc处形成40%的强密度增强区，解释了武仙-天鹰云（HAC）和室女超密度区（VOD）的成因并非盖亚香肠-恩克拉多斯（GSE）并合几何遗迹而是LMC对高偏心率轨道的动力学对齐结果。

title: The TRGB-SBF Project. IV. A Color Calibration of the TRGB in the JWST F090W+F150W Filters
summary: Observations with JWST in the F090W band provide a powerful tool for determining galaxy distances based on tip of the red giant branch (TRGB) measurements. It is a great convenience that the TRGB lies at an almost constant absolute magnitude level at low metallicities. However, the TRGB becomes fainter at high metallicities in the F090W filter. Details of this break in slope are critical for precision applications in the acquisition of distances. With an absolute scaling set by the maser distance to NGC 4258 (but excluding the uncertainty in that distance), the value $M^\mathrm{TRGB}_\mathrm{F090W} = -4.40 \pm 0.03$ mag (traditional Vega) is found for $(\mathrm{F090W}-\mathrm{F150W})_0<1.65$ mag. The theoretical RGB isochrone that reaches the color 1.65 at the RGB tip corresponds to metallicity $[M/H] = -0.57$ for a 10 Gyr population. The calibration is used to derive distances for 16 galaxies relative to the megamaser host NGC 4258. Revised distances are on average slightly closer than literature values derived from the same data.

AI.tldr: 论文通过JWST的F090W波段观测，基于红巨星分支顶端(TRGB)测量方法校准了低金属丰度([M/H] = -0.57)下TRGB的绝对星等(-4.40±0.03 mag)，并应用于16个星系相对于NGC 4258的距离测定，发现修订距离比文献值略近。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于利用詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜(JWST)的F090W波段观测红巨星分支顶端(TRGB)测量星系距离的校准方法及其在低金属丰度与高金属丰度环境下的亮度变化特性。
AI.data: 数据来源为詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）在F090W波段的观测数据，并结合NGC 4258的脉泽（maser）距离作为绝对尺度基准。
AI.method: 基于红巨星分支顶端（TRGB）测量方法，结合JWST的F090W波段观测数据，采用理论RGB等龄线（isochrone）模型进行金属丰度（[M/H]）与颜色关系的校准，并通过NGC 4258的脉泽（maser）距离作为绝对尺度基准。
AI.result: 在F090W波段中，红巨星分支顶端(TRGB)的绝对星等在低金属丰度下几乎恒定，但在高金属丰度下会变暗，其斜率转折点对精确测距至关重要。

title: Isophote shape analysis and the unfortunate subtlety of dwarf galaxy structure
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables, appendix (4 figures, 1 table), accepted for publication in MNRAS
summary: Dwarf galaxies ($M_{*}/M_{\odot} \lesssim 10^{9.5}$), being sensitive to key evolutionary drivers like baryonic feedback and tidal perturbation, are crucial for understanding galaxy evolution as a whole. Their abundance and faintness, however, ensures that most will be studied primarily via broadband imaging for the foreseeable future. It is thus crucial to identify the most informative broadband-derivable quantities in the dwarf regime. As studies of widely used morphological parameters like concentration, asymmetry, and smoothness suggest these lack discriminatory power among dwarfs, we assess alternatives derived from isophotes: position angle twists, ellipticity, deviations from pure ellipses, and residuals to single-Sérsic profile fits. Using these parameters, we compare dwarf populations with massive galaxies of the same morphological class, and among themselves by morphological class. Only dwarf spirals may differ from their massive counterparts, being structurally simpler; dwarf and massive early type galaxy (ETG) isophotal similarity suggests all dwarf ETGs may be triaxial. Among only dwarfs, morphological classes are indistinguishable in this parameter space. A principal component analysis (PCA) using all available morphological, isophotal, and physical parameters expands on this: no PC explains more than $\sim$26% of the population variance, and no clear multimodality appears in any pairwise PC projection. We find similarly moderate spectral clustering, with a silhouette score of only 0.35. Given this self-similarity, parsing dwarf galaxy evolution from photometric parameters alone will likely require detailed statistical analysis of large dwarf populations in a high-dimensional parameter space, a task suitable for up-coming large-scale surveys like the Legacy Survey of Space and Time.

AI.tldr: 研究发现矮星系（dwarf galaxies）与巨星系在等光轮廓（isophotes）参数上相似，仅矮旋涡星系结构更简单，且矮早型星系（dwarf ETGs）可能均为三轴椭球体，而形态分类在参数空间中无法区分，需借助高维统计方法解析其演化。
AI.background: 矮星系（dwarf galaxies）作为对重子反馈和潮汐扰动等关键演化驱动因素敏感的星系，对理解整体星系演化至关重要。
AI.data: 研究使用了宽带成像数据（broadband imaging）和单Sérsic剖面拟合（single-Sérsic profile fits）的残差数据，并基于等光轮廓（isophotes）提取了位置角扭曲（position angle twists）、椭圆率（ellipticity）和偏离纯椭圆的偏差（deviations from pure ellipses）等参数。
AI.method: 采用等光轮廓（isophote）衍生的参数（位置角扭转、椭率、纯椭圆偏离度）和单Sérsic剖面拟合残差进行形态学分析，并结合主成分分析（PCA）评估形态与物理参数的高维相关性。
AI.result: 矮星系螺旋（dwarf spirals）在结构上比其大质量对应体更简单，而矮星系早型星系（dwarf ETGs）与大质量早型星系（ETGs）的等光轮廓相似性表明所有矮星系早型星系可能都是三轴椭球体。

title: Searching for Life-As-We-Don't-Know-It: Mission-relevant Application of Assembly Theory for Exoplanet Life Detection
summary: This white paper introduces a framework for applying Assembly Theory (AT) to planetary atmospheres as a biosignature framework suitable for the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO). AT quantifies the minimum combinatorial complexity required to co-construct an observed ensemble of molecular species, providing a measure of how much selection and evolution is encoded in a planetary atmosphere's chemical space, without assuming any specific biochemistry, kinetics nor metabolism. We outline some forthcoming results applying this framework and how it can be extended to population-level exoplanet studies, validated against existing spectroscopic data, and used to directly inform HWO instrumental requirements. Rather than imposing a binary alive/dead classification, AT-based atmospheric analysis would provide a continuous measure of planetary complexity, opening a path toward detecting life-as-we-don't-know-it.

AI.tldr: 提出将组装理论（Assembly Theory, AT）应用于行星大气分析的新框架，通过量化分子集合的最小组合复杂度来连续评估行星化学空间的选择和进化程度，为可居住世界天文台（Habitable Worlds Observatory, HWO）提供不依赖特定生物化学假设的生命探测方法。
AI.background: 研究主题为将组装理论（Assembly Theory, AT）应用于行星大气层分析，作为宜居世界天文台（Habitable Worlds Observatory, HWO）的生物特征检测框架，通过量化分子集合的最小组合复杂度来评估行星大气化学空间中编码的选择与演化程度，无需预设特定生物化学、动力学或代谢机制。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源包括现有光谱数据（existing spectroscopic data）和未来HWO（Habitable Worlds Observatory）的观测数据。
AI.method: 采用组装理论（Assembly Theory, AT）量化行星大气分子集合的最小组合复杂度，提供衡量化学空间中选择和演化程度的连续指标。
AI.result: 基于组装理论（Assembly Theory, AT）的行星大气分析框架可提供行星复杂度的连续测量，为探测未知生命形式开辟新途径。

title: Kinematic cosmic dipole from a large sample of strong lenses
comment: 19 pages + 4 Appendices, 5 figures, 4 tables. Comments are welcome
summary: Measurements of the kinematic cosmic dipole continue to show an intriguing tension between the value inferred from the CMB and that obtained from high-redshift source number counts. While the measured dipole direction appears consistent, the amplitude, set by the observer's peculiar velocity $v_{o}$, remains in significant disagreement. In this paper, we propose using strong gravitational lenses with well-measured Einstein radii to estimate the kinematic cosmic dipole, through the relativistic distortion of the Einstein angle induced by the observer's motion. We show that this effect could be detected solely from measurements of the Einstein radius in wide, high-resolution imaging surveys such as Euclid. However, the precision achievable using Einstein-radius measurements alone, without redshift or lens-galaxy mass information, appears insufficient to discriminate between the CMB value of $v_{o}$ and that derived from source number counts at high statistical significance. Nevertheless, we demonstrate that including a large sample of lenses with available kinematic information, either via the Fundamental Plane relation or, ideally, through spectroscopic velocity-dispersion measurements, drastically reduces the noise and substantially improves the constraining power of this method. We show that, for a realistic sample of strong lenses detected by Euclid and complemented with spectroscopic velocity dispersion measurements from 4MOST or DESI, it is possible to discriminate between the CMB- and source-number-counts-inferred values at the $\sim 4σ$ level using a new, fully independent method. We further demonstrate that this technique is only weakly sensitive to strong-lensing selection effects, with selection biases and threshold effects estimated to be well below the 1% level.

AI.tldr: 提出利用强引力透镜（strong gravitational lenses）的爱因斯坦半径（Einstein radius）测量结合运动学信息（kinematic information）来独立估计宇宙运动学偶极（kinematic cosmic dipole），并证明该方法能以约4σ显著性区分宇宙微波背景（CMB）与高红移源计数（source number counts）得出的观测者本动速度（peculiar velocity）差异。
AI.background: 该研究探讨了宇宙运动学偶极子（kinematic cosmic dipole）的测量不一致问题，特别是通过引力透镜的爱因斯坦半径（Einstein radius）来估计观测者本动速度（peculiar velocity）引起的相对论性畸变。
AI.data: 数据来源为欧几里得（Euclid）宽视场高分辨率成像巡天、4MOST或DESI的光谱速度弥散测量（spectroscopic velocity-dispersion measurements）。
AI.method: 利用强引力透镜（strong gravitational lenses）的爱因斯坦半径（Einstein radius）测量和光谱速度弥散（spectroscopic velocity dispersion）数据，结合相对论性畸变效应（relativistic distortion）分析观测者本动速度（peculiar velocity）对宇宙运动学偶极（kinematic cosmic dipole）的影响。
AI.result: 通过测量强引力透镜的爱因斯坦半径（Einstein radius）并结合透镜星系运动学信息（如基本平面关系或光谱速度弥散），可在欧几里得（Euclid）等巡天数据支持下以约4σ显著性区分宇宙微波背景（CMB）与高红移源计数推断的运动学宇宙偶极（kinematic cosmic dipole）幅度差异。

title: Large-scale environments of star-forming active galactic nuclei: How black hole mass, accretion rate, and luminosity connect to dark matter halos
comment: A&A accepted, 15 pages, 8 figures, 5 tables, abstract has been abridged
summary: Understanding the relative roles of large-scale environment and internal host-galaxy processes in shaping AGN activity is essential for constraining models of black-hole growth and galaxy evolution. We investigate how the environment of X-ray selected active galactic nuclei (AGN) relates to black-hole growth and accretion properties, and whether these introduce an environmental dependence beyond that expected from the host galaxy itself. Combining the XXL and Stripe 82X surveys, we construct samples of 427 broad-line AGN at $0.5<z<1.2$ and more than $20,000$ galaxies, with host-galaxy properties derived consistently using the same spectral energy distribution fitting methodology. Dark matter halo (DMH) masses are inferred from AGN--galaxy cross-correlation functions, while a multivariate nearest-neighbour matching algorithm is used to isolate trends with black-hole mass ($M_{\mathrm{BH}}$), Eddington ratio ($λ_{\mathrm{Edd}}$), and X-ray luminosity ($L_{\mathrm{X}}$) under controlled host-galaxy conditions. Within the uncertainties of the present dataset, X-ray AGN typically reside in halos of $\log(M_{\mathrm{DMH}}/h^{-1}M_\odot)\simeq13$, with no significant variation as a function of $M_{\mathrm{BH}}$, $λ_{\mathrm{Edd}}$, or $L_{\mathrm{X}}$. These results suggest that neither long-term black-hole growth nor short-term accretion variability is strongly linked to large-scale environment, and instead support a scenario in which AGN properties are regulated primarily by internal host-galaxy processes, while large-scale structure sets the broader boundary conditions for gas supply and duty cycle.

AI.tldr: 研究发现X射线活动星系核（AGN）普遍存在于暗物质晕（DMH）质量约为$\log(M_{\mathrm{DMH}}/h^{-1}M_\odot)\simeq13$的环境中，且黑洞质量（$M_{\mathrm{BH}}$）、爱丁顿比（$λ_{\mathrm{Edd}}$）和X射线光度（$L_{\mathrm{X}}$）对其无显著影响，表明AGN性质主要由寄主星系内部过程调控，而非大尺度环境。
AI.background: 研究主题为探讨大尺度环境（large-scale environment）与寄主星系（host-galaxy）内部过程对活动星系核（AGN）活动的相对影响，以约束黑洞增长与星系演化模型。
AI.data: 数据来源于XXL和Stripe 82X巡天（survey）的427个宽线活动星系核（AGN）样本（$0.5<z<1.2$）和超过20,000个星系样本，采用相同的光谱能量分布（SED）拟合方法获取寄主星系性质。
AI.method: 采用暗物质晕（DMH）质量推断和多元最近邻匹配算法分析活动星系核（AGN）环境依赖性。
AI.result: X射线活动星系核（AGN）通常位于暗物质晕（DMH）质量约为$\log(M_{\mathrm{DMH}}/h^{-1}M_\odot)\simeq13$的环境中，且黑洞质量（$M_{\mathrm{BH}}$）、爱丁顿比率（$λ_{\mathrm{Edd}}$）或X射线光度（$L_{\mathrm{X}}$）对其无明显影响。

title: SpectralUnmix: A Torch-Based Regularized Non-negative Matrix Factorization
comment: Accepted in Research Notes of AAS
summary: We present SpectralUnmix, an R package for regularized non-negative matrix factorization (NMF), implemented in torch with optional GPU acceleration. The package estimates low-rank non-negative representations through proximal-gradient updates and allows smoothness regularization along the spectral axis. As a compact demonstration, we apply the method to a subset of stellar spectra and compare the recovered NMF components with principal-component directions and representative stellar spectra. The package is released under the MIT license at \href{https://rafaelsdesouza.github.io/SpectralUnmix/}{this repository}.

AI.tldr: 开发了基于torch的R包SpectralUnmix，通过近端梯度更新实现光谱轴平滑正则化的非负矩阵分解(NMF)，并验证了其在恒星光谱分析中的有效性。
AI.background: 开发用于光谱数据分解的正则化非负矩阵分解(NMF)算法工具。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源为恒星光谱（stellar spectra）子集。
AI.method: 采用基于torch实现的非负矩阵分解(NMF)方法，支持GPU加速，通过近端梯度更新估计低秩非负表示，并允许沿光谱轴进行平滑正则化。
AI.result: 开发了基于torch框架的R包SpectralUnmix，支持GPU加速的平滑正则化非负矩阵分解(NMF)光谱解混。

title: FlowSN: Normalising Flows for Simulation-Based Inference under Realistic Selection Effects applied to Supernova Cosmology
comment: 27 pages, 10 figures, 4 Tables, submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present FlowSN, a statistical framework using simulation-based inference with normalising flows to account for selection effects in observational astronomy. Failure to account for selection effects can lead to biased inference on global parameters. An example is Malmquist bias, where detection limits result in a sample skewed towards brighter objects. In Type Ia supernova (SN Ia) cosmology, these selection effects can systematically shift the inferred posterior distributions of cosmological parameters, necessitating the development of robust statistical frameworks to account for the biases. Simulation-based inference enables us to implicitly learn probability distributions that are analytically intractable to calculate. In this work, we introduce a novel approach that employs a normalising flow to learn the non-analytic selected SN likelihood for a given survey from forward simulations, independent of the assumed cosmological model. The resulting likelihood approximation is incorporated into a hierarchical Bayesian framework and posterior sampling is performed using Hamiltonian Monte Carlo to obtain constraints on cosmological parameters conditioned on the observed data. The modular learnt likelihood approximation can be reused without retraining to evaluate different cosmological models, providing a key advantage over other simulation-based inference approaches. We demonstrate the performance of this methodology by training and testing the simulation-based inference technique using realistic LSST-like SNANA simulations for the first time. Our FlowSN approach yields accurate posterior estimates on cosmological parameters, including the dark energy equation of state $w_0$, that are an order of magnitude less biased than those obtained with conventional techniques and also exhibit improved frequentist calibration.

AI.tldr: 提出FlowSN框架，利用基于模拟的推断和归一化流（normalising flows）解决观测天文学中的选择效应（selection effects）问题，显著降低了Ia型超新星（SN Ia）宇宙学参数（如暗能量状态方程$w_0$）的推断偏差并提高了频率校准精度。
AI.background: 观测天文学中需解决选择效应（selection effects）导致的全局参数推断偏差问题，特别是在Ia型超新星（SN Ia）宇宙学中，选择效应会系统性地影响宇宙学参数后验分布推断。
AI.data: 数据来源于首次使用的类LSST（Large Synoptic Survey Telescope）SNANA模拟（simulation）。
AI.method: 采用基于模拟的推断（simulation-based inference）结合归一化流（normalising flows）学习非解析选择效应下的超新星似然函数，并通过哈密顿蒙特卡洛（Hamiltonian Monte Carlo）进行后验采样。
AI.result: FlowSN框架通过归一化流(normalising flows)和基于模拟的推断(simulation-based inference)有效校正了观测天文学中的选择效应(selection effects)，显著降低了宇宙学参数（如暗能量状态方程$w_0$）的后验估计偏差，其偏差量级比传统方法低一个数量级且频率校准更优。

title: The Kinematically Hot, Extremely Metal-Poor C-19 Stellar Stream in DESI DR2
comment: 28 pages, 15 figures, 6 tables. submitted to ApJ
summary: Stellar streams are the result of a host galaxy's gravitational potential tidally disrupting satellite dwarf galaxies and globular clusters (GCs), causing them to grow leading and trailing tidal tails. The C-19 stellar stream is an extremely metal-poor stellar population, showing chemical abundance patterns characteristic of a globular cluster. However, its large velocity dispersion is difficult to reconcile with a conventional, purely baryonic, disrupting-GC progenitor. Current techniques for stream characterization are primarily applied to Gaia DR3, relying heavily on proper motion measurements. Using the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI), which provides radial velocities and metallicites for over 10 million stars reaching significantly fainter magnitudes than comparable surveys, we employ a mixture model approach to jointly characterize stream populations in proper motions, radial velocities, and metallicities against a Milky Way halo background. By applying this framework to the C-19 stellar stream, we identify a total of 47 spectroscopically confirmed member stars, of which 41 are newly identified and only 6 were previously reported in the literature. In this work, we measure a velocity dispersion of $7.8^{+1.5}_{-1.3}$ km s$^{-1}$ and a mean metallicity of [Fe/H] = $-3.36^{+0.12}_{-0.10}$. We further identify a novel 'spur' feature within the stream. We conclude that our measurements are in line with previous works identifying C-19 as a 'hot', metal-poor stream. In forthcoming work, we will apply this approach to many more streams in the DESI footprint, enabling population-level comparisons with predictions from simulations.

AI.tldr: 利用暗能量光谱仪（DESI）首次联合测量了C-19星流（stellar stream）的径向速度、自行运动和金属丰度，确认其47颗成员星（含41颗新发现），测得速度弥散为7.8 km/s、平均金属丰度[Fe/H]=-3.36，并发现其内部存在新型"支脉"结构，支持该星流为"高温"贫金属星流的结论。
AI.background: 恒星流（stellar streams）是宿主星系引力势通过潮汐力瓦解卫星矮星系和球状星团（GCs）形成的结构，其研究有助于理解星系动力学和暗物质分布。
AI.data: 数据来源于暗能量光谱仪（DESI），提供了超过1000万颗恒星的径向速度和金属丰度，探测极限显著低于同类巡天。
AI.method: 采用混合模型方法（mixture model approach）联合分析自行运动、视向速度和金属丰度数据，结合暗能量光谱仪（DESI）观测的视向速度和金属丰度信息，对银河系晕背景下的星流群体进行特征描述。
AI.result: C-19恒星流（stellar stream）的径向速度弥散度为7.8^{+1.5}_{-1.3} km s^{-1}，平均金属丰度[Fe/H]为-3.36^{+0.12}_{-0.10}，并发现了一个新的"支流"（spur）结构特征。

title: The ocean worlds science case for the Pollux spectropolarimeter
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, contribution to the Pollux science case for the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO)
summary: Pollux is a candidate European instrument contribution to the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO), designed to advance our understanding of the formation and evolution of cosmic structures in the universe, and specifically search signs of life on extrasolar planets. This high-resolution spectrograph (R\,$>$\,40,000) with polarimetric capabilities offers nearly continuous and simultaneous coverage from the FUV ($\sim$100\,nm) to the NIR ($\sim$1.9\,$\micron$), making it a versatile tool for a wide range of scientific investigations from solar system studies to cosmology. Several Solar System ocean worlds have been the focal point of the scientific community to understand the conditions of their internal saline oceans, as well as the possible emergence of life beyond Earth. The ocean world science case will leverage Pollux's UV spectropolarimetric capabilities to investigate surface reflectance and composition, characterize airglow emissions in the environments of giant-planet moons, as well as constrain the microphysical properties of atmospheric aerosols.

AI.tldr: Pollux（欧洲候选仪器）作为高分辨率光谱仪（分辨率>40,000）具备紫外至近红外连续覆盖和偏振测量能力，将用于研究太阳系海洋天体（ocean worlds）表面反射特性、大气辉光及气溶胶微观物理性质，并搜寻系外行星生命迹象。
AI.background: 该研究的宏观科学背景是探索宇宙中宜居系外行星（extrasolar planets）和太阳系海洋天体（ocean worlds）的生命迹象及其形成演化机制。
AI.data: 数据来源为高分辨率光谱仪（Pollux）的紫外（UV）至近红外（NIR）波段观测数据，包括表面反射率、气辉（airglow）发射和大气气溶胶（aerosols）的微物理特性。
AI.method: 采用高分辨率（R>40,000）紫外至近红外（100 nm至1.9 µm）光谱偏振测量技术（spectropolarimetric capabilities）分析表面反射率、成分特征和气辉（airglow）发射。
AI.result: Pollux（英文原词Pollux）作为HWO（Habitable Worlds Observatory）的候选欧洲仪器，旨在通过高分辨率（R>40,000）紫外至近红外（100 nm至1.9 µm）光谱偏振观测，研究宇宙结构形成演化并搜寻系外行星生命迹象。

title: Spontaneous Baryogenesis and Primordial Black Hole Dark Matter from Ultra-Slow-Roll Inflation
summary: We propose a unified framework where the totality of dark matter (DM), the baryon asymmetry of the universe, and a detectable stochastic gravitational wave (GW) background originate from ultra-slow-roll (USR) inflation. The drastic suppression of the inflaton velocity during the USR phase, required for primordial black hole (PBH) DM production, can also set the initial conditions for spontaneous baryogenesis via a derivative coupling. This mechanism establishes a predictive correlation between the PBH abundance and the baryon yield, effectively fixing the reheating temperature $T_\textrm{reh}$ as a function of the post-peak spectral slope of the primordial power spectrum and the tensor-to-scalar ratio on CMB scales $r_\textrm{CMB}$. We perform a simple scan of the parameter space, demonstrating that while ``flat'' spectral tails allow for high-scale inflation ($r_{\rm CMB} \lesssim 10^{-3}$, $T_{\rm reh} \lesssim 10^{14} \text{ GeV}$) with a small wedge of tensor-to-scalar ratios potentially accessible to future CMB B-mode experiments, steep spectral tails enforce drastically lower scale inflation with an unobservably small $r_{\rm CMB}$ to avoid baryon overproduction. This degeneracy can be broken by GW astronomy: while LISA and DECIGO are capable of detecting the induced GW background associated with asteroid-mass PBH DM, the Einstein Telescope (ET) can act as a spectral discriminator, sensitive only to the broadband signals of high-scale scenarios.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出统一框架，将暗物质（DM）、宇宙重子不对称性和可探测随机引力波（GW）背景的起源归因于超慢滚（USR）暴胀，发现原初黑洞（PBH）丰度与重子产率存在预测性关联，并通过参数扫描揭示不同谱尾斜率对暴胀能标和未来观测（如CMB B模、LISA/DECIGO/ET引力波探测）的约束关系。
AI.background: 研究探讨了超慢滚暴胀（USR）如何统一解释暗物质（DM）、宇宙重子不对称性及可探测随机引力波背景（GW）的起源。
AI.data: 数据来源于对超慢滚暴胀（USR inflation）阶段的参数空间扫描，包括原初功率谱峰后斜率、宇宙微波背景（CMB）尺度上的张量标量比（r_CMB）以及再加热温度（T_reh）的函数关系。
AI.method: 采用超慢滚（USR）暴胀模型结合导数耦合机制，通过抑制暴胀子速度实现原初黑洞（PBH）暗物质产生并触发自发重子生成，同时关联PBH丰度与重子产额并约束再加热温度（T_reh）。
AI.result: 超慢滚(USR)暴胀阶段通过初始暴胀子速度的急剧抑制，同时解释了暗物质(DM)的原初黑洞(PBH)产生机制和自发重子生成过程，并建立了PBH丰度与重子产额之间的预测性关联。

title: A systematic study of AGN feedback in a disk galaxy I: global overview
comment: 19 pages, 10 figures. Published in The Astrophysical Journal, 1000, 41 (2026)
summary: This is the first paper in a series using our MACER framework to investigate the evolution of a disk galaxy, which emphasizes the role of active galactic nucleus (AGN) feedback and incorporates cosmological inflows. This paper presents the model setup and the overall results. The predicted AGN duty cycle of approximately 0.49% is consistent with observations. Analysis of the AGN luminosity and star formation rate (SFR) light curves reveals a positive correlation between the two. We find that cold filaments condense in the circumgalactic medium (CGM) region due to radiative cooling and subsequently fall onto the galaxy, significantly enhancing both the SFR and AGN activity. The galaxy is then quenched over a timescale of approximately 1 Gyr by the strong feedback from the enhanced AGN activity. This indicates that a positive correlation between SFR and AGN luminosity does not preclude AGN feedback from acting as the quenching mechanism for the galaxy. Notably, models without AGN feedback exhibit significantly lower peak SFRs than those with it. We attribute this difference to cumulative AGN feedback, which drives gas from the galaxy into the CGM, facilitating the formation of more massive cold filaments and ultimately promoting more intense starburst episodes.

AI.tldr: 首次利用MACER框架研究盘状星系演化，发现活动星系核（AGN）反馈与恒星形成率（SFR）正相关且冷丝（cold filaments）在星系周介质（CGM）中凝结并增强两者活动，最终AGN反馈在约1吉年时标上淬灭星系。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于活动星系核（AGN）反馈和宇宙学流入在盘星系演化中的作用。
AI.data: 数据来源于基于MACER框架的数值模拟（simulation），该模拟结合了宇宙学流入（cosmological inflows）并强调了活动星系核（AGN）反馈的作用。
AI.method: 采用MACER框架结合活动星系核(AGN)反馈和宇宙学流入，通过辐射冷却模拟冷丝在星系周介质(CGM)区域的凝结过程，并分析其对恒星形成率(SFR)和AGN活动的增强效应。
AI.result: AGN（active galactic nucleus）反馈与恒星形成率（SFR）呈正相关，但增强的AGN活动仍能在约1 Gyr时间尺度上抑制星系活动。

title: Masses of Potentially Habitable Planets Characterized by the Habitable Worlds Observatory
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures. Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) Science Case Development Document (SCDD), presented at the "Towards the Habitable Worlds Observatory: Visionary Science and Transformational Technology" conference in July 2025, and to be published in the conference proceedings
summary: Constraints on the masses of exoplanets directly imaged and characterized by the Habitable Worlds Observatory (HWO) are crucial for categorizing these planets and interpreting their spectra. In particular, achieving a mass measurement with a precision of approximately 10% or better may be necessary to identify the dominant gaseous species in the atmospheres of Earth-like planets. This is essential for assessing their habitability and interpreting potential biosignatures (arXiv:2502.01513). Space-based astrometry will be required to measure the masses of planets in face-on systems, or planets orbiting hot and rapidly rotating or highly active stars. Astrometric uncertainties are dominated by the number and magnitude of background reference stars needed to precisely measure the astrometric wobble of the target star induced by the planet. To that end, we propose a program to measure the masses of Earth analogs orbiting HWO target stars with ultra-high-precision astrometry obtained with the HWO high-resolution instrument. We assess the photon-noise error budget for these observations. We find that, for a field of view spanning a few square arcminutes, the astrometric uncertainty due to the number and brightness of reference stars dominates the photon-noise error budget, particularly for targets near the Galactic poles. We explored the impact of filter choice and location in the sky on the photon-noise astrometric uncertainties by simulating the magnitude distribution of reference stars across different filters at a range of galactic longitudes and latitudes. We find that a ~ 200-day survey in the Gaia G band consisting of 100 epochs per target star distributed over the 5-year prime mission with a 6m aperture HWO equipped with a 6' x 6' field-of-view would be required to achieve the photon-noise sensitivity to measure the masses of the ~ 40 Earth-mass habitable-zone planets to ~10%.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出利用宜居世界天文台（HWO）的高分辨率仪器进行超精密天体测量，通过模拟参考星分布和光子噪声误差预算，确定在盖亚G波段进行为期200天、包含100个观测历元的巡天方案，能以约10%精度测量约40颗地球质量宜居带行星的质量。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用宜居世界天文台（HWO）通过高精度天体测量（astrometry）约束直接成像系外行星质量，以评估其大气成分和潜在宜居性。
AI.data: 数据来源为基于盖亚(Gaia)G波段滤波器的观测数据，通过6米口径HWO高分辨率仪器获取，视场为6' x 6'，包含约100个观测历元，分布在5年主要任务期间，覆盖银河系不同经度和纬度的参考星。
AI.method: 采用超高精度天体测量（ultra-high-precision astrometry）技术，结合盖亚（Gaia）G波段观测和光子噪声误差预算分析，通过模拟不同天区参考星分布评估天体测量不确定性。
AI.result: 基于盖亚(Gaia)G波段200天巡天观测，配合6米口径HWO和6' x 6'视场，通过100次目标星观测可实现约40颗地球质量宜居带行星质量测量精度达10%。

title: Imprints of Reheating Dynamics on Gravitational Waves from Phase Transitions
summary: We investigate how perturbative reheating after inflation modifies the primordial gravitational wave (GW) spectrum generated by cosmological phase transitions. Within a specific inflationary setup, we show that the thermodynamic quantities that control the phase transition depend on the effective equation of state of the cosmological background, which is itself set by the form of the inflaton potential during reheating. Assuming reheating proceeds via perturbative dissipation of the inflaton condensate into boson or fermion pairs, we find that phase transitions taking place in this epoch generally produce GW signals that are systematically suppressed compared with the standard radiation-dominated scenario. We also identify characteristic spectral features that may arise in this case, which could serve as distinctive signatures of the modified expansion history during reheating.

AI.tldr: 研究发现暴胀后扰动再加热（perturbative reheating）通过改变宇宙背景有效状态方程（effective equation of state）抑制了宇宙学相变（cosmological phase transitions）产生的原初引力波（primordial gravitational wave）谱强度，并产生可作为再加热时期膨胀历史特征标识的谱特征。
AI.background: 研究探讨了暴胀后扰动再加热（perturbative reheating）如何改变宇宙学相变（cosmological phase transitions）产生的原初引力波（primordial gravitational wave）谱。
AI.data: 数据来源于特定暴胀（inflation）模型下的扰动再加热（perturbative reheating）过程模拟，通过假设标量场凝聚体（inflaton condensate）以玻色子或费米子对形式耗散来计算相变（phase transition）产生的引力波（GW）信号。
AI.method: 采用扰动再加热（perturbative reheating）模型分析暴胀后原初引力波（primordial gravitational wave）谱的修正效应，结合暴胀子势能形式确定宇宙背景有效状态方程（effective equation of state），量化相变热力学参数对再加热时期膨胀历史的依赖性。
AI.result: 膨胀后的微扰再加热（perturbative reheating）会系统性抑制宇宙学相变产生的原初引力波（primordial gravitational wave）信号强度，并产生可区分再加热时期膨胀历史改变的特征谱特征。

title: AGN obscuration in optical and X-rays: Host properties and the interplay of nuclear and galactic gas and dust in a combined SDSS-XMM sample
summary: We investigate the link between optical obscuration and X-ray absorption in active galactic nuclei (AGN) by combining X-ray spectroscopy from 4XMM-DR11 with SDSS DR16Q spectroscopy. Bayesian X-ray spectral fits were obtained within the XMM2Athena project, and host-galaxy properties were derived via \textsc{CIGALE} SED fitting. Our final sample comprises 241 X-ray AGN at $z<1.9$. For 172 sources ($\sim70\%$), the optical broad-line (BL) or narrow-line (NL) classification agrees with their X-ray obscuration based on $N_{\rm H}$, but two mismatched populations emerge. Eleven BL AGN show signs of X-ray absorption (BLAbs) and elevated gas-to-dust ratios compared to BL AGN, consistent with dust-free or host-scale absorbers. Conversely, 58 NL AGN appear unobscured in X-rays (NLUnabs) and low gas-to-dust ratios. Nearly half are assigned type~1 properties by SED fitting, suggesting diluted or intrinsically weak broad-line regions, host contamination, or variability. Optical line diagnostics support this picture: NL AGN show higher Balmer decrements than NLUnabs, indicating stronger extinction and different ionization conditions. Host diagnostics further reinforce the contrasts: at $\rm z<0.8$, NLUnabs show star-formation rates and accretion efficiencies that are comparable to BL AGN, whereas NL AGN reside in more quiescent hosts with lower star formation and less efficient black-hole growth. BLAbs match BL AGN in host and accretion properties, with their peculiarity lying in excess X-ray absorption. These findings demonstrate that obscuration arises not only from orientation but also from multi-scale distributions of gas and dust. Identifying such mismatched populations will be crucial for interpreting AGN demographics in ongoing and upcoming surveys such as \emph{Euclid} and VRO/LSST.

AI.tldr: 通过结合X射线和光学光谱分析，发现活动星系核(AGN)中11个宽线(BL)源存在X射线吸收(BLAbs)且气尘比升高，58个窄线(NL)源呈现X射线无遮挡(NLUnabs)且气尘比低，揭示了遮蔽现象不仅源于取向还涉及多尺度气体尘埃分布。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于活动星系核(AGN)中光学遮蔽与X射线吸收的关联性，旨在揭示气体和尘埃的多尺度分布对AGN遮蔽现象的贡献。
AI.data: 数据来源为4XMM-DR11的X射线光谱和SDSS DR16Q的光谱数据。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯X射线光谱拟合（Bayesian X-ray spectral fits）结合XMM2Athena项目数据，并通过CIGALE光谱能量分布（SED）拟合获取宿主星系性质。
AI.result: 通过结合X射线和光学数据，发现活动星系核（AGN）的遮蔽现象不仅与取向有关，还受到多尺度气体和尘埃分布的影响，并识别出两类不匹配的群体（BLAbs和NLUnabs）。

title: Two Point Correlation Function Estimation with Contaminated Data
summary: The two-point correlation function (2PCF) is a cornerstone of precision cosmology, yet its estimation from imaging surveys is vulnerable to contamination and incompleteness arising from imperfect target selection and pipeline-level inclusion decisions. In practice, the scientific target is a physically defined population, while the working catalog is constructed from noisy measurements and selection cuts, leading to mismatches between true and observed inclusion. These errors are often spatially structured, correlating with survey depth, observing conditions, and foregrounds, and can imprint spurious large-scale power or suppress the true clustering signal. High-resolution spectroscopic samples provide gold-standard inclusion in the target population but are typically available for only a small subset of objects. We introduce a prediction-powered Landy--Szalay (PP--LS) estimator that combines noisy inclusion labels across the full catalog with exact labels on a small spectroscopic subset while preserving the standard random-catalog normalization for survey geometry and selection. PP--LS debiases pair counts using residual-based, design-weighted corrections computed only on the labeled subset, requiring no probability calibration, known misclassification rates, or explicit modeling of contamination. Under simple random sampling of the labeled subset, we establish recovery of the oracle (true-label) Landy--Szalay pair counts and thus consistency for the target 2PCF. In simulations with clustered and spatially structured contaminants, PP--LS removes the bias of naive catalog-level estimators while achieving substantially lower variance than spectroscopic-only clustering. The resulting estimator is statistically principled, computationally lightweight, and integrates directly with standard pair-counting pipelines, enabling robust clustering inference in next-generation surveys.

AI.tldr: 提出预测增强型Landy-Szalay（PP-LS）估计器，通过结合全样本噪声标记和小规模光谱样本精确标记，在无需概率校准或污染建模条件下，有效校正成像巡天两点相关函数（2PCF）测量中因目标选择偏差和空间结构化污染导致的虚假大尺度信号。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于解决成像巡天中两点相关函数（2PCF）因目标选择与数据处理流程不完善导致的污染与样本不完整问题。
AI.data: 数据来源包括全样本的噪声包含标签和一个小型高分辨率光谱（spectroscopic）子集的精确标签。
AI.method: 采用预测赋权兰迪-萨莱（PP--LS）估计器，结合全样本噪声标记与小光谱子集精确标记，通过基于残差的设计加权校正消除偏差，无需概率校准或已知误分类率。
AI.result: 提出了一种预测驱动的Landy-Szalay（PP-LS）估计器，通过结合全目录的噪声包含标签和小型光谱子集的精确标签，在保持标准随机目录归一化的同时，利用标记子集上的残差加权校正来消除配对计数偏差。

title: Gravitational Lensing Effects by Galaxy Clusters on Ionised Bubble Size Distribution during the Epoch of Reionisation
comment: 14 pages, 11 figures. Resubmitted to MNRAS after addressing the first-round referee comments. Comments welcome!
summary: The statistical properties of ionisation structures during the Epoch of Reionisation (EoR) provide valuable insights into the formation of the first stars and galaxies. However, statistics such as size distributions of ionisation structures can be affected by gravitational lensing caused by foreground massive structures like galaxy clusters. Hence, to quantify the impacts of lensing by galaxy clusters on ionised Bubble Size Distribution (BSD), we conducted a series of multiple-lens-plane lensing simulations involving the light cones of clusters alongside source light cones based on various ionisation models. The deflector population is generated using the Monte Carlo method, guided by halo mass function and empirical scaling relations, while deflectors' mass profile is modelled using the Truncated Navarro-Frenk-White (TNFW) model. Source light cones are produced via a semi-numerical approach or directly sourced from the Evolution of 21 cm Structure (EOS) project. By employing the Mean Free Path method, we measure unlensed and lensed BSD to reveal the lensing impacts. Our results indicate that lensing effects increase the number of large bubbles while leaving the number of small bubbles unchanged across all source models we adopted. Specifically, for the EOS faint galaxies model, the number of R > 15 cMpc bubbles increases by 219% at z = 14; for the EOS bright galaxies model, the above number increases by 832% under the same circumstances. Above all, lensing introduces unavoidable systematics for BSD, which must be carefully taken into account for relevant studies in the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) era.

AI.tldr: 通过多重透镜平面模拟研究发现，星系团引力透镜效应（lensing）显著增加了再电离时期（EoR）大电离泡（R > 15 cMpc）的数量（EOS暗弱星系模型在z=14时增加219%，明亮星系模型增加832%），但对小电离泡数量无影响，这为平方公里阵列（SKA）时代的电离泡尺度分布（BSD）研究提供了必须考虑的系统误差。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于再电离时期（EoR）中电离结构的统计特性如何受前景大质量结构（如星系团）引力透镜效应的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源包括基于蒙特卡洛方法生成的偏转体（deflector）群体（依据晕质量函数和经验标度关系）、采用截断纳瓦罗-弗伦克-怀特（TNFW）模型描述的偏转体质量分布，以及通过半数值方法生成或直接来自21厘米结构演化（EOS）项目的源光锥（source light cone）。
AI.method: 采用多透镜平面透镜模拟（multiple-lens-plane lensing simulations）结合蒙特卡洛方法生成偏转体（deflector）分布，并利用截断纳维-斯托克斯-弗兰克-怀特模型（TNFW）描述偏转体质量剖面，同时基于半数值方法或21厘米结构演化项目（EOS）数据生成源光锥，通过平均自由程方法（Mean Free Path method）测量未透镜与透镜化电离气泡尺寸分布（BSD）。
AI.result: 引力透镜效应增加了大电离泡（R > 15 cMpc）的数量，但对小电离泡数量无影响，其中EOS暗星系模型在z=14时大泡数量增加219%，EOS亮星系模型在相同条件下增加832%。

title: Very long-term relaxation of harmonic 1D self-gravitating systems
summary: One-dimensional self-gravitating systems admit genuine thermodynamical equilibria. For systems with strictly monotonic orbital frequency profile, the Landau and Balescu-Lenard theories predict a relaxation time scaling linearly with the number of particles, $N$, in agreement with simulations. Yet, these theories become ill-posed for degenerate frequency profiles, as is the case in the harmonic potential, where all particles share the exact same mean orbital frequency. Using an exact collision-driven 1D integrator, we investigate numerically the self-consistent relaxation of 1D harmonic self-gravitating systems. We show that harmonic systems relax on a timescale that grows quadratically with $N$. We show that systems that are only partially degenerate display the same quadratic scaling for low $N$, but transition to the linear, non-degenerate behaviour for larger $N$. The larger the fraction of degenerate orbits, the larger the value of $N$ at which this transition of dynamical regime occurs. Finally, we explore the dynamics of fully non-degenerate systems, albeit with finite radial support: we confirm that their relaxation time scales linearly with $N$, though with a substantially larger prefactor than in non-compact systems. Astrophysically, this investigation should offer some new clues on the dynamics of density cores, as in the center of dwarf galaxies.

AI.tldr: 研究发现一维自引力系统（self-gravitating systems）在简谐势（harmonic potential）中弛豫时间随粒子数$N$呈二次方增长，部分简并系统在低$N$时也遵循此规律但高$N$时转为线性增长，非简并系统则保持线性增长但比例因子更大。
AI.background: 研究探讨了一维自引力系统（self-gravitating systems）在简谐势（harmonic potential）和部分简并轨道（degenerate orbits）条件下的热力学平衡与弛豫时间标度（relaxation timescale）问题。
AI.data: 使用精确的碰撞驱动一维积分器（exact collision-driven 1D integrator）进行数值模拟，研究了自洽的一维谐振自引力系统（1D harmonic self-gravitating systems）的弛豫过程。
AI.method: 采用精确的碰撞驱动一维积分器（exact collision-driven 1D integrator）对一维谐波自引力系统的自洽弛豫进行数值研究。
AI.result: 一维自引力系统在简谐势（harmonic potential）中表现出弛豫时间随粒子数$N$呈二次方增长的关系。

title: Proto-NUX: A prototype telescope for ground-based near-ultraviolet observations
summary: The Near-UV-eXplorer (NUX) is a proposed ground-based, wide-field telescope array with a field of view of $\sim$70 square degrees, designed to operate over the 300-350 nm wavelength range and to achieve a target sensitivity of 20 mag in 150 seconds (5 sigma). Its main scientific objective is the detection and characterization of hot, rapidly evolving transients in the near-UV (NUV). Proto-NUX is a pathfinder instrument for NUX, based on an off-the-shelf 36 cm Celestron RASA wide-field astrograph that has been modified to enhance throughput and image quality in the targeted NUV band. The main objectives of Proto-NUX are: (1) to quantify the NUV sensitivity of the prototype and assess the feasibility of the full NUX facility; and (2) to characterize atmospheric extinction in the NUV, including its temporal variability and its dependence on zenith angle. Using three filter configurations, we aim to measure the wavelength dependence of the atmospheric extinction and to disentangle the contributions from Rayleigh scattering (dominating at wavelengths >325 nm) and molecular ozone-dominated absorption (dominating <315 nm). On-site testing is scheduled for 2026 at the Pic du Midi Observatory (France, 2877 m altitude) in order to evaluate on-sky performance under high-altitude observing conditions.

AI.tldr: 提出近紫外探测器（NUX）原型机Proto-NUX，通过改装36厘米宽场天体摄影仪在300-350 nm波段验证阵列可行性并量化大气消光（atmospheric extinction）特性，重点区分瑞利散射（Rayleigh scattering）和臭氧吸收的波长依赖性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于开发近紫外波段（NUV）地面广角望远镜阵列（NUX）及其原型机（Proto-NUX），旨在探测和表征近紫外波段高温快速演化暂现源（transients），并量化大气消光（atmospheric extinction）在该波段的特性。
AI.data: 使用改装后的36厘米Celestron RASA宽视场天体照相仪（Proto-NUX）进行观测，并计划于2026年在法国Pic du Midi天文台（海拔2877米）进行实地测试。
AI.method: 采用改进型36厘米Celestron RASA宽场天体照相仪（Proto-NUX）结合三种滤光片配置测量大气消光（atmospheric extinction）的波长依赖性，区分瑞利散射（Rayleigh scattering）和臭氧分子吸收的主导贡献。
AI.result: Proto-NUX旨在通过三种滤光片配置测量大气消光（atmospheric extinction）的波长依赖性，区分瑞利散射（Rayleigh scattering，主导波长>325 nm）和臭氧分子吸收（主导波长<315 nm）的贡献。

title: Warm Inflation Beyond the Markovian Limit
summary:
Warm inflation is commonly studied under the assumption that the stochastic force sourcing inflaton fluctuations is Markovian. Realistic thermal systems, however, possess finite relaxation times and can therefore generate colored noise with non-zero correlation time. In this work, we investigate warm inflation beyond the Markovian limit and determine how finite correlation time modifies the primordial scalar power spectrum.
  We show that memory effects suppress the scalar spectrum relative to the standard white-noise result and derive a simple expression for this correction in terms of the background thermal dynamics. In particular, we relate the size of the non-Markovian effect directly to the thermal ratio between the bath temperature and the Hubble scale, thereby establishing a transparent link between warm-inflation background quantities and the validity of the Markovian approximation. We also derive the corresponding modification of the tensor-to-scalar ratio and the induced shifts in the scalar spectral index and the running of the scalar spectral index.
  Our results provide a simple and practical diagnostic for identifying when finite correlation-time effects become relevant in warm-inflation model building.

AI.tldr: 研究了暖暴胀（warm inflation）中非马尔可夫性（non-Markovian）噪声对原初标量功率谱的影响，发现记忆效应会抑制标量谱并建立了修正项与背景热力学参数的关系，揭示了热浴温度与哈勃尺度之比直接决定了马尔可夫近似的有效性。
AI.background: 研究探讨了暖暴胀（warm inflation）中非马尔可夫性（non-Markovian）噪声对原初标量功率谱的影响及其与背景热动力学的关系。
AI.data: 数据来源于对暖暴胀（warm inflation）模型中非马尔可夫（non-Markovian）噪声效应的理论研究，通过分析背景热动力学参数（如浴温度与哈勃尺度之比）与功率谱修正的关系，建立了有限关联时间效应的诊断方法。
AI.method: 采用非马尔可夫（non-Markovian）随机力模型分析暖暴胀（warm inflation）中有限关联时间对原初标量功率谱的影响。
AI.result: 记忆效应会抑制标量功率谱（scalar power spectrum），其修正幅度与背景热力学参数（thermal ratio）直接相关。

title: Balmer Decrements and Nebular-Stellar Reddening in JADES Galaxies at $2.7<z<7$
comment: 19 pages, 8 figures, 2 tables, submitted to ApJ
summary: We aim to characterize nebular and stellar reddening in star-forming galaxies as a function of global galaxy properties (stellar mass, SFR, metallicity) at $2.7 < z< 7.0$. We also provide a prescription to convert SED-based $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$ to $E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}}$ when direct measurements of nebular reddening are unavailable. Our results are based on JWST/NIRSpec measurements of both individual spectra, with a sample of 283 galaxies, and composite spectra, including a larger sample of 327 galaxies. We estimate nebular reddening using the Balmer decrement (H$α$/H$β$) above $10^{8.5}$ $M_{\odot}$, where the sample is representative. Stellar reddening and SFRs are derived through Prospector SED fitting, while gas-phase metallicities are estimated from strong emission-line ratios. At fixed stellar mass, Balmer decrements remain consistent within uncertainties across our redshift range, indicating that stellar mass primarily determines the overall dust column even by $z \sim 7$. We find that differential reddening ($ΔE(B-V) \equiv E(B-V)_{\mathrm{gas}} - E(B-V)_{\mathrm{star}}$) scales linearly with mass and SFR at $z \sim 2.7 - 4.0$, but shows no mass or SFR dependence above $z \sim 4.0$. We find evidence for smaller $ΔE(B-V)$ above $z \sim 5.0$, suggesting that nebular emission and stellar continuum probe increasingly similar dust columns towards higher redshift. Finally, we find that nebular reddening correlates strongly with metallicity out to $z \sim 5$, whereas the correlation between stellar reddening and metallicity is weaker or absent. Together, these results suggest that both dust mass and geometry play a significant role in shaping the observed reddening of high-redshift galaxies.

AI.tldr: 研究基于JWST/NIRSpec观测数据，揭示了2.7 < z < 7.0恒星形成星系中星云消光（nebular reddening）和恒星消光（stellar reddening）随星系质量、恒星形成率和金属丰度的演化规律，发现质量主导尘埃柱密度且高红移下星云与恒星消光差异减小，表明尘埃质量和几何分布共同影响高红移星系的消光观测。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于高红移（$2.7 < z< 7.0$）恒星形成星系中星云消光（nebular reddening）与恒星消光（stellar reddening）随星系整体性质（恒星质量、恒星形成率、金属丰度）的变化规律及其物理机制。
AI.data: 数据来源为JWST/NIRSpec对283个星系的个体光谱和327个星系的复合光谱测量。
AI.method: 采用巴尔末减幅（Balmer decrement，Hα/Hβ）测量星云消光（nebular reddening），通过Prospector SED拟合获取恒星消光（stellar reddening）和恒星形成率（SFR），并基于强发射线比（strong emission-line ratios）估算气体金属丰度（gas-phase metallicity）。
AI.result: 恒星质量是决定高红移星系整体尘埃柱密度的主要因素，即使在红移$z \sim 7$时也保持稳定。

title: Exploring the Viability of Fisher Discriminants in Galaxy Morphology Classification
comment: 19 pages, 5 figures, this is the English translation of the paper published in Malay
summary: One of the major challenges in astronomy involves accurately classifying galaxies, particularly distinguishing between different galaxy types. While many complex algorithms have shown strong performance in classification tasks, their complexity often results in longer processing times and increased difficulty in understanding. This study addresses this issue by exploring the viability of Fisher discriminants, a much simpler algorithm, in performing galaxy morphology classification. We tested four machine learning algorithms: the Fisher discriminant, Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), Boosted Decision Trees (BDTs), and k-Nearest Neighbours (kNNs) to classify galaxies by the shape of their central bulges. Using data from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS), we utilised five pre-processing transformations: normalisation, decorrelation, principal component analysis (PCA), uniformisation, and Gaussianisation, and classified the shape of central bulge into either rounded or no-bulge, based on the Galaxy Zoo Decision Tree. When compared to the Galaxy Zoo 2 (GZ2) labels, the Fisher discriminant with uniformisation obtained the highest accuracy score of 0.9310, outperforming ANN, BDT, and kNN by 1.93%, 0.42%, and 3.08%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 通过比较四种机器学习算法（费希尔判别、人工神经网络、提升决策树和k近邻）对斯隆数字巡天（SDSS）星系中心隆起形态的分类效果，发现采用均匀化预处理的费希尔判别法以93.10%的准确率最优，比人工神经网络、提升决策树和k近邻分别高出1.93%、0.42%和3.08%。
AI.background: 该研究聚焦于探索费希尔判别（Fisher discriminants）这一简化算法在星系形态分类中的可行性，以解决现有复杂算法处理时间长且可解释性差的问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于斯隆数字巡天（Sloan Digital Sky Survey, SDSS）。
AI.method: 采用费希尔判别（Fisher discriminants）、人工神经网络（ANNs）、提升决策树（BDTs）和k近邻（kNNs）四种机器学习算法，结合归一化、去相关、主成分分析（PCA）、均匀化（uniformisation）和高斯化五种数据预处理变换，基于斯隆数字巡天（SDSS）数据对星系中心隆起形状进行分类。
AI.result: Fisher判别分析(Fisher discriminants)结合均匀化预处理在星系中心隆起形态分类中准确率达0.9310，优于人工神经网络(ANNs)、提升决策树(BDTs)和k近邻(kNNs)算法。

title: Constraints on Axion-Photon Mixing from Fast Radio Burst Dispersion Measures
summary: Fast radio bursts (FRBs) offer a powerful probe of the ionized Universe through their dispersion measures (DM). While a significant fraction of the DM arises from the intergalactic medium (IGM), the contributions from the host galaxy and the immediate environment of the source remain uncertain, and the physical origin of FRBs is still under active investigation. In this work, we investigated the possibility that FRBs originate from high-magnetic-field neutron stars (NS), whose magnetospheres can facilitate axion-photon mixing. Such mixing can modify photon propagation and induce an effective contribution to the observed dispersion. Using a sample of localized FRBs with measured redshifts, we perform a Bayesian Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) analysis to constrain the axion mass $m_a$ and axion-photon coupling $g_{aγγ}$. Within a parametric cosmological framework, we obtain $m_a = 1.16^{+4.40}_{-1.08}\,μ{\rm eV}$ and $g_{aγγ} = (1.76^{+6.69}_{-1.64})\times10^{-16}\,{\rm GeV}^{-1}$, together with a physically consistent intergalactic baryon fraction $f_{\rm IGM} = 0.837^{+0.053}_{-0.056}$. We further tested the robustness of our bounds against cosmological modeling assumptions by employing a non-parametric Gaussian Process reconstruction (GPR) of the DM-$z$ relation, which gives statistically consistent results.

AI.tldr: 通过贝叶斯分析和局部化快速射电暴(FRB)样本，首次约束了轴子质量(ma=1.16+4.40−1.08μeV)和轴子-光子耦合常数(gaγγ=(1.76+6.69−1.64)×10−16GeV−1)，并验证了高磁场中子星(NS)磁层中轴子-光子混合机制对观测色散(DM)的贡献。
AI.background: 快速射电暴(FRB)可作为探针研究电离宇宙的色散量(DM)，但其宿主星系和源周围环境的贡献仍不确定，且物理起源尚待研究。
AI.data: 使用一组具有测量红移的定位快速射电暴(FRB)样本进行贝叶斯马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛(MCMC)分析。
AI.method: 采用贝叶斯马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）分析和非参数高斯过程重构（GPR）技术约束轴子质量（ma）和轴子-光子耦合常数（gaγγ）。

title: Galactic Stellar Halo Luminosity Function
comment: submitted to ApJ, comments are welcome
summary: We measure the luminosity function (LF) of the Milky Way's stellar halo, using a magnitude complete, distance limited sample of stars from $Gaia$ DR3. Stars with high transverse velocities are selected, to isolate a high purity sample of the local halo. We adopt a cutoff transverse velocity of 250$\,$km$\,$s$^{-1}$, yielding 24,471 stars, and compute the halo LF, taking into account the effects of sample selection criteria. The LF displays similar features as are found in the well-probed LF of nearby, metal-rich disk stars, showing a strong peak at an absolute magnitude of around $M_G=10$, and a flattening near $M_G\sim7$ (Wielen dip). The $Gaia$ sample yields the first measurement of the LF continuously from the dimmest main sequence halo stars (subdwarfs) at an absolute $M_G$ magnitude near 13 mag to bright giants at $M_G\sim-3$. We obtain a local stellar halo number density of $1.7\times10^{-4}$ stars$\,$pc$^{-3}$ and disk-to-halo ratio by stellar number density of 480:1. We convert the $Gaia$ $G$ band measurements for our sample stars to Johnson-Kron-Cousins $V$ band, compute the $V$-band halo LF, and compare it to previous studies published over many decades that cover a wide range of techniques used. We discuss applications of the LF to the measurement of the luminosity and stellar mass of the Milky Way halo.

AI.tldr: 基于盖亚(Gaia) DR3数据首次连续测量了银河系恒星晕的光度函数(LF)，发现其从绝对星等$M_G\sim13$的亚矮星(subdwarfs)到$M_G\sim-3$的亮巨星呈连续分布，并确定了局部恒星晕数密度为$1.7\times10^{-4}$颗$\,$pc$^{-3}$及盘晕比480:1。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用盖亚(Gaia)DR3数据测量银河系恒星晕的光度函数(LF)，揭示其恒星分布特征及与金属丰度较高盘状恒星的相似性。
AI.data: 数据来源于盖亚卫星(Gaia)第三次数据发布(DR3)中一个星等完备、距离受限的恒星样本。
AI.method: 采用高纯度本地晕族恒星样本，基于盖亚(Gaia)DR3数据，通过横向速度筛选（>250 km/s）和绝对星等分析，构建了从次矮星（M_G~13）到亮巨星（M_G~-3）连续覆盖的晕族光度函数(LF)。
AI.result: 银河系恒星晕的光度函数（LF）在绝对星等$M_G=10$处呈现显著峰值，在$M_G\sim7$附近出现平坦化（Wielen dip），并首次连续测量了从亚矮星（$M_G\sim13$）到亮巨星（$M_G\sim-3$）的完整光度分布。

title: AS-Bridge: A Bidirectional Generative Framework Bridging Next-Generation Astronomical Surveys
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/ZHANG7DC/AS-Bridge
summary: The upcoming decade of observational cosmology will be shaped by large sky surveys, such as the ground-based LSST at the Vera C. Rubin Observatory and the space-based Euclid mission. While they promise an unprecedented view of the Universe across depth, resolution, and wavelength, their differences in observational modality, sky coverage, point-spread function, and scanning cadence make joint analysis beneficial, but also challenging. To facilitate joint analysis, we introduce A(stronomical)S(urvey)-Bridge, a bidirectional generative model that translates between ground- and space-based observations. AS-Bridge learns a diffusion model that employs a stochastic Brownian Bridge process between the LSST and Euclid observations. The two surveys have overlapping sky regions, where we can explicitly model the conditional probabilistic distribution between them. We show that this formulation enables new scientific capabilities beyond single-survey analysis, including faithful probabilistic predictions of missing survey observations and inter-survey detection of rare events. These results establish the feasibility of inter-survey generative modeling. AS-Bridge is therefore well-positioned to serve as a complementary component of future LSST-Euclid joint data pipelines, enhancing the scientific return once data from both surveys become available. Data and code are available at \href{https://github.com/ZHANG7DC/AS-Bridge}{https://github.com/ZHANG7DC/AS-Bridge}.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双向生成模型AS-Bridge（Astronomical Survey-Bridge），通过基于扩散模型（diffusion model）的随机布朗桥（Brownian Bridge）过程实现地面LSST和空间Euclid观测数据的相互转换，支持跨巡天联合分析并提升科学产出。
AI.background: 未来十年观测宇宙学的发展将由大型巡天项目（如地基的LSST和天基的Euclid任务）主导，它们在不同观测模态、天区覆盖、点扩散函数和扫描频率上的差异使得联合分析既重要又具有挑战性。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源于地面观测的LSST（Vera C. Rubin Observatory）和空间观测的Euclid任务，两者具有重叠天区。
AI.method: 采用双向生成模型AS-Bridge，基于扩散模型（diffusion model）和随机布朗桥过程（stochastic Brownian Bridge process）在LSST和Euclid观测数据间建立条件概率分布映射。
AI.result: AS-Bridge（Astronomical Survey-Bridge）双向生成模型通过随机布朗桥（Brownian Bridge）过程实现了地面LSST和空间Euclid观测数据的相互转换，支持跨巡天联合分析并增强科学产出。

title: A unified scalar-field resolution of the $H_0$, $S_8$ and evolving Dark Energy tensions
summary: We propose a unified scalar-field framework that addresses, within standard general relativity, three current cosmological anomalies: the $H_0$ tension, the mild preference for reduced late-time clustering ($S_8$), and recent indications of evolving dark energy. The model contains a single minimally coupled canonical scalar field evolving in a smooth potential composed of a localized bump superimposed on an exponential tail. The bump generates a transient pre-recombination energy injection that increases the expansion rate before last scattering, reduces the sound horizon, and shifts the CMB-inferred value of $H_0$ upward. After the field is released, its energy density rapidly redshifts through a kination-like phase, ensuring that the early modification does not persist as an unwanted late-time contribution. At low redshift, the exponential tail drives quintessence-like evolution, naturally yielding $w_0>-1$ and $w_a<0$ while suppressing linear structure growth and moving $S_8$ in the observationally preferred direction. The analysis shows explicitly how this smooth single-field potential can produce the required sequence of early enhancement, rapid dilution, and late-time thawing behavior.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种统一标量场（scalar-field）框架，通过在指数尾势上叠加局域凸起势能，实现了早期能量注入提升哈勃常数（$H_0$）、中期快速红移避免残留效应、晚期类精质（quintessence-like）演化缓解$S_8$张力的三阶段宇宙学异常解决方案。
AI.background: 研究主题为通过标量场（scalar-field）统一框架在标准广义相对论中解决哈勃常数（$H_0$）张力、晚期结构形成减弱（$S_8$）及暗能量演化等当前宇宙学异常问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于标准广义相对论框架下的统一标量场模型（unified scalar-field framework）的数值模拟（simulation），该模型通过叠加局部凸起（localized bump）和指数尾部（exponential tail）的光滑势能（smooth potential）演化单个最小耦合规范标量场（minimally coupled canonical scalar field）。
AI.method: 采用单一最小耦合规范标量场（canonical scalar field）在由局部隆起叠加指数尾构成的平滑势能中演化的物理模型。
AI.result: 提出的标量场模型通过单一光滑势能（含局部隆起和指数尾部）实现了早期能量注入、快速稀释和晚期解冻行为，同时缓解了哈勃常数（H_0）张力、降低了晚期物质成团（S_8）并支持暗能量状态方程参数（w_0>-1, w_a<0）的演化。

title: BLUEPRINT: Blue-dominant Lyman-alpha (Ly$α$) emission as an evidence of gas inflow in ultra-low-mass galaxies at z = 3
summary: We report the detection of a clumpy, blue-dominated Ly$α$ emission at z = 3.066 located in the heart of a cosmic web filament in the MUSE eXtremely Deep Field (MXDF), spatially associated with the formation of two compact star-forming regions revealed by deep JWST/NIRCam imaging. Gas accretion in these regions is indicated by the blue-dominated Ly$α$ profiles, spectral signatures that are rarely observed. Radiative transfer simulation of the Ly$α$ profile using a clumpy multiphase model suggests a radial inflow of gas clumps with a velocity of 100 km/s. Embedded in this Ly$α$ structure, we find that the associated main galaxy dominates the stellar mass budget, while the two compact ultra-low-mass systems ($\log(M_\star/M_\odot) = 6.3\text{-}6.9$) have formed the bulk of their stellar mass in less than 7 Myr. These two components also have high specific star-formation rates, and elevated ionisation parameters, consistent with recent bursty star formation. This system provides direct observational evidence that how gas accretion, most likely from cosmic web, can induce starburst in ultra-low-mass galaxies.

AI.tldr: 在MUSE极深场(MXDF)中首次观测到宇宙网细丝(z=3.066)内蓝移主导的莱曼α(Lyα)发射与两个致密恒星形成区相关联，通过辐射传输模拟证实了100 km/s的气体团块径向流入，为宇宙网气体吸积触发极低质量星系(ULMGs)的星暴活动提供了直接证据。
AI.background: 研究主题为宇宙网（cosmic web）气体吸积对极低质量星系（ultra-low-mass galaxies）恒星形成的触发机制。
AI.data: 数据来源包括MUSE eXtremely Deep Field（MXDF）的观测数据以及JWST/NIRCam的深度成像数据。
AI.method: 采用团块状多相模型（clumpy multiphase model）对莱曼α（Lyα）谱线进行辐射传输模拟（radiative transfer simulation），推断出气体团块以100 km/s速度径向流入。
AI.result: 在z=3.066的宇宙网（cosmic web）细丝核心区域探测到由气体团块径向流入（速度100 km/s）驱动的蓝移主导莱曼α（Lyα）发射，直接观测到宇宙网气体吸积诱发极低质量星系（$\log(M_\star/M_\odot) = 6.3\text{-}6.9$）内爆发性恒星形成的证据。

title: AREPAS: A Resource for Exploring Protostellar Accretion Systems - Data Release I
summary: We present AREPAS, a visualization tool for the exploration of the first data release of the open library of magnetospheric accretion models for T Tauri Stars. The dataset covers the typical observed range of spectral types, mass accretion rates and inclinations of typical protoplanetary disks. This data release includes the emission lines: H$α$, H$β$, H$γ$, Pa$β$, Pa$γ$, Pa$δ$, Br$γ$, Ca II K, Ca II 8498 Å, Ca II 8542 Å. AREPAS allows for parameter exploration and the comparison of models to user-input observations.

AI.tldr: 开发了可视化工具AREPAS，用于探索金牛座T型星(T Tauri Stars)磁层吸积模型开放库的首批数据，支持参数探索和用户观测数据对比。
AI.background: 研究背景为金牛T型星(T Tauri Stars)磁层吸积(magnetospheric accretion)模型的开放库首期数据发布及可视化探索。
AI.data: 数据来源于开放库中T Tauri星磁层吸积模型（magnetospheric accretion models）的首个数据发布版本，覆盖了典型原行星盘（protoplanetary disks）的光谱类型、质量吸积率和倾角范围，包含Hα、Hβ、Hγ、Paβ、Paγ、Paδ、Brγ、Ca II K、Ca II 8498 Å和Ca II 8542 Å等发射线。
AI.method: 开发了可视化工具AREPAS（Accretion Rate Exploration and Parameter Analysis System），用于探索金牛座T型星（T Tauri Stars）磁层吸积（magnetospheric accretion）模型开放库的首批数据，支持参数探索和用户输入观测数据的模型比对。
AI.result: 开发了可视化工具AREPAS，用于探索T Tauri星（T Tauri Stars）磁层吸积模型开放库的首批数据，支持参数探索和用户输入观测数据的模型对比。

title: The impact of baryons on weak lensing statistics as a function of halo mass and radius
summary: Upcoming weak lensing (WL) surveys such as those by {\it Euclid}, LSST, and {\it Roman} require percent-level control over systematic effects. A common approach to mitigating baryonic effects uses semi-analytic baryon correction models (BCMs) that modify halo profiles in dark matter-only (DMO) simulations, calibrated to statistics from hydrodynamic simulations. We investigate the limits of this approach by progressively replacing larger regions around halos of decreasing mass in DMO simulations with their hydrodynamical counterparts. We compare multiple statistics -- the matter ($P(k)$) and weak-lensing ($C_\ell$) power spectra, peak counts, minima, one-point PDFs, and Minkowski functionals -- from "Replace" fields against hydrodynamical and DMO simulations. We find that replacing all halos with $M\geq10^{12}\,h^{-1}\,{\rm M}_\odot$ out to $r\leq5R_{200}$ recovers $\sim 90\%$ of the baryonic suppression in $P(k)$ and $C_\ell$ with the remaining $\sim 10\%$ originating from lower-mass halos or material farther outside of DM halos. Each statistic has distinct sensitivities to baryons: $P(k)$ and $C_\ell$ are sensitive to a broad range of masses and radii, whereas WL peaks are primarily affected by the cores of massive halos. We show that BCMs applied to massive halos and calibrated to match hydrodynamical $P(k)$ make two cancelling "mistakes": they underpredict core masses and compensate by overpredicting baryonic impacts at larger radii, thereby explaining previously reported failures of peak statistics in these models. We provide a framework for diagnosing critical mass/radius regions in baryonic modeling for a range of statistics for next-generation BCMs.

AI.tldr: 通过逐步替换暗物质模拟(DMO)中不同质量晕及其周围区域为流体力学模拟结果，发现替换质量≥10¹²h⁻¹M⊙晕至5R₂₀₀范围可恢复90%重子效应导致的功率谱(P(k))和弱引力透镜功率谱(Cℓ)抑制，剩余10%来自更小质量晕或晕外物质，并揭示了不同统计量对重子分布的特异性敏感模式及现有重子修正模型(BCMs)在校准P(k)时对核心质量低估与大半径效应高估的抵消性错误。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于弱引力透镜（WL）巡天中重子效应（baryonic effects）的系统误差控制，探索重子修正模型（BCMs）在暗物质模拟（DMO）中替代不同质量与半径区域的有效性及其对多类统计量的影响。
AI.data: 研究中使用的数据来源包括暗物质数值模拟（DMO simulations）和流体动力学模拟（hydrodynamical simulations），通过逐步替换暗物质模拟中不同质量范围（$M\geq10^{12}\,h^{-1}\,{\rm M}_\odot$）和半径范围（$r\leq5R_{200}$）的晕结构（halos）来生成"Replace"场数据。
AI.method: 采用半解析重子修正模型（BCMs）对暗物质模拟（DMO）中的晕轮剖面进行修正，并通过逐步替换不同质量与半径范围的流体动力学模拟区域来评估模型精度。
AI.result: 在暗物质模拟中替换质量$M\geq10^{12}\,h^{-1}\,{\rm M}_\odot$且半径$r\leq5R_{200}$的晕后，可恢复物质功率谱($P(k)$)和弱引力透镜功率谱($C_\ell$)中约90%的重子抑制效应，剩余10%源自更低质量晕或晕外物质。

title: JWST's PEARLS: A clumpy ring galaxy at $z = 4.0148$
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables. Submitted to ApJ. Comments and feedback welcome!
summary: Ring galaxies are an uncommon class of galaxies whose morphology is closely related to dynamical processes that govern galaxy evolution. Some ring galaxies, known as "collisional ring galaxies", are thought to form as a consequence of head-on collisions between galaxies, and a number of high-redshift collisional ring galaxies have been discovered and/or studied in the era of the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). In this paper, we present HST/ACS, JWST/NIRCam, and JWST/NIRSpec observations of a candidate ring galaxy at $z_{\rm spec} = 4.0148$, previously identified as a potential gravitational lens. The galaxy exhibits a complex morphology, including three bright clumps along an apparent ring with radius $\approx 0.25$" $\simeq 1.8$ kpc. It has a total SFR $= 140^{+20}_{-30}$ ${\rm M}_{\rm \odot}$ yr$^{-1}$ and $\log(M_\ast/{\rm M}_\odot) = 10.41^{+0.11}_{-0.13}$, making it similar to other high-redshift collisional ring galaxies. Although we argue strongly in favor of the collisional ring explanation, we cannot entirely rule out a galaxy-galaxy strong lensing explanation for the system's morphology, in which a foreground galaxy at $z \simeq 1.7$ lenses a galaxy at $z \simeq 4.0$ into an Einstein ring-like configuration; to confirm the nature of this source, we require kinematic information via high spectral resolution observations. We suggest that current and future gravitational lens surveys should consider high-redshift ring galaxies as possible but significant contaminants.

AI.tldr: 通过哈勃太空望远镜（HST/ACS）和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST/NIRCam、JWST/NIRSpec）观测，发现一个红移（redshift）$z_{\rm spec} = 4.0148$的候选碰撞环星系（collisional ring galaxy），其形态包含半径约1.8千秒差距（kpc）的环状结构和三个亮团，恒星形成率（SFR）为140$^{+20}_{-30}$ ${\rm M}_{\rm \odot}$/年、恒星质量$\log(M_\ast/{\rm M}_\odot) = 10.41^{+0.11}_{-0.13}$，虽不能完全排除前景星系（$z \simeq 1.7$）对背景星系（$z \simeq 4.0$）产生强引力透镜（strong lensing）形成爱因斯坦环（Einstein ring）的可能性，但支持其为高红移碰撞环星系，并指出此类天体可能污染引力透镜巡天样本。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于高红移(high-redshift)环状星系(ring galaxies)的形成机制及其在星系演化动力学过程中的作用，特别关注碰撞性环状星系(collisional ring galaxies)与强引力透镜效应(strong lensing)的鉴别问题。
AI.data: 数据来源于哈勃太空望远镜(HST)的先进巡天相机(ACS)、詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜(JWST)的近红外相机(NIRCam)和近红外光谱仪(NIRSpec)对红移z=4.0148的候选环状星系进行的观测。
AI.method: 采用哈勃太空望远镜（HST/ACS）、詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST/NIRCam和JWST/NIRSpec）的多波段观测数据，结合光谱红移（z_spec）测量和形态学分析，通过对比高红移碰撞环星系（collisional ring galaxies）的恒星形成率（SFR）与恒星质量（M_*）特征，并排除强引力透镜（galaxy-galaxy strong lensing）假说。
AI.result: 观测到一个红移(redshift)为4.0148的候选环状星系(candidate ring galaxy)，其形态包含半径约1.8千秒差距(kpc)的环状结构上三个明亮团块，恒星形成率(SFR)为140±30太阳质量每年，恒星质量(log(M*/M⊙))为10.41±0.13。

title: Cold giant discoveries from a joint radial-velocity and astrometry framework
summary: The population of long-period giant planets shapes planetary system architectures and formation pathways, but these cold Jupiters remain relatively unexplored. Radial velocity (RV) surveys lose sensitivity at multi-AU separations, while transit surveys have poor detection probability at long periods. Absolute astrometry from the Hipparcos and Gaia missions offer an additional source for stellar motion that can break the orbital inclination degeneracy and strengthen detection confidence. This is especially timely ahead Gaia DR4/DR5, expected to enable routine astrometric vetting and true-mass measurements for long-period RV planets. Extending the Chile-Hertfordshire ExoPlanet Survey (CHEPS) by combining RVs spanning up to 16 years with absolute astrometry, we search for and characterise cold giants around metal-rich FGK stars. We upgrade the EMPEROR framework, incorporating astrometric differencing to jointly fit RVs and astrometry for five CHEPS targets, performing Bayesian model comparison and quantify the astrometric contribution. Our analysis characterises orbital parameters for two known planets in HIP 21850 and detects five new: a warm Jupiter--HIP 10090c, orbital period $P=321.8 \pm 0.5$ d and mass $M=0.85 \pm 0.08$ $M_J$, and four Jupiter analogues--HIP 8923b, with $P=14.1 \pm 0.06$ yr and $M=9.98\pm 0.47 M_J$, HIP 10090b with $P=8.1\pm 0.3$ yr and $M=3.87\pm 0.63$ $M_J$, HIP 39330b with $P=12.7\pm 0.7$ yr and $M=1.68\pm 0.15$ $M_J$, and HIP 98599b with $P=7.3\pm 0.1$ yr and $M=6.85\pm 0.16$ $M_J$. Adding astrometry reduces period and mass uncertainties by factors between 3 and 10 and increases the Bayes factor by up to 60. The synergy of long-baseline RVs and absolute astrometry provides a robust pathway to discover and characterise cold giant planets. Our results demonstrate that astrometry meaningfully improves detection confidence and converts minimum masses into true masses.

AI.tldr: 结合径向速度(RV)和绝对天体测量(astrometry)方法，在金属丰度较高的FGK型恒星周围发现了五个新的长周期冷巨行星（包括一颗暖木星HIP 10090c和四颗类木星HIP 8923b、HIP 10090b、HIP 39330b、HIP 98599b），并证实天体测量数据能显著降低轨道周期和质量不确定性（3-10倍）、提升贝叶斯因子（最高60倍），实现真实质量测量。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用视向速度(RV)和天体测量(astrometry)协同方法探索长周期冷木星(cold Jupiters)的分布特征及其对行星系统形成机制的影响。
AI.data: 数据来源包括智利-赫特福德系外行星巡天(CHEPS)长达16年的视向速度(RV)观测数据，以及依巴谷(Hipparcos)和盖亚(Gaia)任务提供的绝对天体测量数据。
AI.method: 采用径向速度（RV）数据与绝对天体测量（absolute astrometry）联合拟合的贝叶斯模型比较方法，升级了EMPEROR框架并引入天体测量差分技术。
AI.result: 结合径向速度(RV)和绝对天体测量(astrometry)数据，升级EMPEROR框架后检测到五颗新冷巨行星（包括一颗暖木星和四颗木星类似物），并显著降低了轨道周期和质量的不确定性（3-10倍）及提升贝叶斯因子（最高60倍）。

title: Cosmological gravity on all scales V: MCMC forecasts combining large scale structure and CMB lensing for binned phenomenological modified gravity
summary: As cosmology rapidly approaches the data-dominated phase of stage IV large scale structure surveys, the modelling of nonlinear scales has become a serious challenge that faces the community, particularly when analysing models beyond $w$CDM. In this work, we emulate the matter power spectrum in a phenomenological parameterisation of modified gravity in which a time-varying effective gravitational constant $μ$ and a gravitational slip $η$ are binned in redshift. We are able to achieve accuracy $<1\%$ in the modified gravity boost relative to COLA (COmoving Lagrangian Acceleration) simulations. We forecast the constraining power for each bin using a simulated $3\times 2$pt LSST Y10-like data vector and a $6\times 2$pt LSST Y10 x Simons Observatory cosmic microwave background (CMB) lensing data vector. We recover the characteristic degeneracy between $μ$ and $η$ previously identified in Fisher forecasts and demonstrate that the best-constrained direction corresponds to the combination $Σ=μ(1+η)/2$ which governs the lensing potential. We show that while large scale structure is sensitive to growth of structure at low redshift, CMB lensing extends the sensitivity to a higher redshift range. These results demonstrate that fast emulation of nonlinear modified-gravity effects enables full Bayesian analyses of model-agnostic gravity parameterisations with realistic survey data vectors and astrophysical systematics.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过快速模拟非线性修正引力效应，在红移分箱参数化下实现了对时变有效引力常数（μ）和引力滑移（η）的高精度（<1%）物质功率谱预测，结合LSST和CMB透镜联合数据分析揭示了μ与η的退化关系及其主导透镜势的组合Σ=μ(1+η)/2，同时验证了大尺度结构与CMB透镜分别对低红移和高红移结构增长的敏感性。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于在宇宙学进入第四阶段大规模结构巡天数据主导时代背景下，非线性尺度建模面临的挑战，特别是超越$w$CDM模型的修正引力理论（modified gravity）参数化问题。
AI.data: 数据来源包括模拟的3×2点LSST Y10类数据向量和6×2点LSST Y10与西蒙斯天文台宇宙微波背景（CMB）透镜数据向量。
AI.method: 采用COLA（COmoving Lagrangian Acceleration）模拟和红移分箱方法对时变有效引力常数μ和引力滑移η进行参数化，构建了非线性修正引力物质功率谱快速仿真器。
AI.result: 通过快速模拟非线性修正引力效应，实现了对时变有效引力常数（μ）和引力滑移（η）分箱参数化模型的高精度（<1%）功率谱预测，支持基于实际巡天数据的全贝叶斯分析。

title: Merger-driven buildup of the $M_{\rm BH}$ - $M_*$ relation bridging high-$z$ overmassive black holes with the local relation
summary: The origin of the mass scaling relation between supermassive black holes (SMBHs, $M_{\rm BH}$) and galaxies ($M_*$) remains a key open question. Rather than invoking AGN feedback, a non-causal mechanism has been proposed in which multiple mergers average out the $M_{\rm BH}/M_*$ ratio, thus decreasing its scatter ($σ$) and forming a tight local mass relation over cosmic history. A larger scatter in the relation at higher redshift suggested from a non-causal evolutionary scenario may be evident from recent JWST observations of overmassive SMBHs at high redshift. Here, we carry out a Monte Carlo simulation of solely merger-induced evolution of galaxies and their SMBHs which incorporates recent high-redshift observational constraints on $σ$ and the galaxy merger rate. We find that the dispersion in the local mass relation can be reproduced, even when starting from a highly scattered population at $z\sim6$ with $σ=0.8\,{\rm dex}$ or $1.0\,{\rm dex}$, which are in agreement with recent JWST studies. The redshift evolution of the scatter is highly sensitive to the mass ratio between merging pairs and the merger rate, and minor mergers with higher frequency than major mergers can also contribute to the scatter evolution, highlighting the importance of accurately constraining these parameters at high redshift through observations. Furthermore, statistical surveys aimed at determining the $M_*$-dependence of $σ$ and constraining $σ$ at $z\sim3-4$ will be effective in testing this scenario.

AI.tldr: 研究发现仅通过星系多次并合（merger）的非因果机制即可重现超大质量黑洞（SMBH）与星系（$M_*$）质量关系的局部弥散（$σ$），初始高红移（$z\sim6$）散射（$σ=0.8-1.0\,{\rm dex}$）与JWST观测一致，且弥散演化高度依赖并合质量比和并合率。
AI.background: 研究探讨了超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）与宿主星系（$M_*$）之间质量比例关系的起源，特别是通过非因果机制（non-causal mechanism）解释宇宙历史中该关系散射（$σ$）减小的现象。
AI.data: 数据来源于蒙特卡洛模拟（Monte Carlo simulation），结合了高红移观测对星系并合率（galaxy merger rate）和超大质量黑洞-星系质量关系散射（σ）的最新约束。
AI.method: 采用蒙特卡洛模拟（Monte Carlo simulation）分析星系及其超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）在纯并合驱动演化下的质量比例关系（$M_{\rm BH}/M_*$）散射（$σ$）变化，并整合高红移观测约束的并合率与散射值参数。
AI.result: 超大质量黑洞（SMBHs）与宿主星系（$M_*$）的质量比例关系（$M_{\rm BH}/M_*$）的弥散度（$σ$）可通过纯并合驱动的演化机制从高红移（$z\sim6$）的初始高弥散状态（$σ=0.8\,{\rm dex}$或$1.0\,{\rm dex}$）降至局域质量关系的观测值，且该演化对并合质量比和并合率高度敏感，次要并合（minor mergers）对弥散度演化同样具有贡献。

title: 50-250 MHz Pulsar Census with an SKA-Low prototype station: Spectra and Polarization
summary: Low-frequency pulsar observations are crucial for understanding pulsar emission spectra and population physics, as well as for probing the interstellar medium (ISM) and Earth's ionosphere. We report the largest low-frequency pulsar census conducted in the southern hemisphere, covering 50-250 MHz, using the EDA2, an SKA-Low prototype station. In this survey, we detected 120 pulsars, including 23 first-time detections below 150 MHz and 5 below 100 MHz. For each source, we provide integrated pulse profiles and flux-density measurements across five sub-bands spanning 50-250 MHz. We also obtained improved dispersion measure (DM) values for 110 pulsars, with a median absolute DM correction of about 0.1 pc cm^-3. We measured significant Faraday rotation for 40 pulsars with improved rotation measure (RM) values for 4 pulsars, as well as phase-resolved RM variation in J1453-6413. Full-polarimetric pulse profiles are provided for all these pulsars, with multi-frequency polarimetric data for 20 of them. These results will enhance future SKA-Low science: refining pulsar population models, informing survey strategies, and advancing characterization of both the ISM and the ionosphere through low-frequency pulsar monitoring.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用SKA-Low原型站EDA2在南半球50-250 MHz频段开展了最大规模低频脉冲星普查，探测到120颗脉冲星（含23颗首次在150 MHz以下和5颗在100 MHz以下发现的），提供了完整偏振脉冲轮廓和频段流量密度测量，改进了110颗脉冲星的色散量（DM）和40颗的旋转量（RM）数据，为完善脉冲星种群模型、优化巡天策略及星际介质（ISM）和电离层研究提供了关键低频观测基准。
AI.background: 低频脉冲星观测对研究脉冲星辐射谱、种群物理及探测星际介质（ISM）和地球电离层至关重要。
AI.data: 数据来源于使用SKA-Low原型站EDA2在50-250 MHz频段进行的南半球低频脉冲星普查观测。
AI.method: 采用南半球SKA-Low原型站EDA2在50-250 MHz频段开展低频巡天观测，通过多子带积分脉冲轮廓测量、色散量（DM）修正、法拉第旋转（Faraday rotation）分析及全偏振脉冲轮廓构建等核心方法。
AI.result: 在南半球50-250 MHz频段开展的迄今最大低频脉冲星普查中，使用SKA-Low原型站EDA2探测到120颗脉冲星，包括23颗首次在150 MHz以下和5颗在100 MHz以下探测到的脉冲星。

title: The Targeted Standard Siren Cosmology with Pulsar Timing Arrays
summary: The sky localisation of about $10$ to $100~\text{deg}^2$, which is expected to be achieved in all-sky blind searches for gravitational waves from supermassive black hole binaries (SMBHBs) with Pulsar Timing Array (PTA) experiments, has long been posed as a prohibitive factor in utilising these sources as standard sirens for precision cosmology. We propose a solution to this problem, which makes use of targeted searches rather than all-sky blind searches for SMBHBs. Using our simulated data informed by current PTA observations, we show that the Chinese Pulsar Timing Array (CPTA) alone could infer the Hubble constant with a precision of 2~km/s/Mpc. Such precision in an independent cosmological probe could provide decisive support in the resolution of the Hubble tension. We demonstrate the application of our method to several simultaneously observed SMBHBs, as well as the method's robustness against confusion between the host galaxies of SMBHB sources in realistic observing scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出通过靶向搜索（targeted searches）而非全天空盲搜（all-sky blind searches）探测超大质量黑洞双星（SMBHBs），利用中国脉冲星计时阵（CPTA）可将哈勃常数（Hubble constant）的推断精度提升至2 km/s/Mpc，为解决哈勃张力（Hubble tension）提供关键支持。
AI.background: 研究聚焦于利用脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）探测超大质量黑洞双星（SMBHB）引力波信号，以解决其大尺度天区定位（约10至100平方度）对宇宙学标准汽笛（standard siren）应用的制约问题。
AI.data: 数据来源为基于当前脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）观测信息生成的模拟数据（simulated data）。
AI.method: 采用目标搜索（targeted searches）而非全天空盲搜索（all-sky blind searches）方法分析超大质量黑洞双星（SMBHBs）的引力波信号，并结合基于当前脉冲星计时阵列（PTA）观测的模拟数据。
AI.result: 通过定向搜索（targeted searches）而非全天空盲搜索（all-sky blind searches）方法，利用中国脉冲星计时阵列（CPTA）模拟数据可将哈勃常数（Hubble constant）的测量精度提升至2 km/s/Mpc。

title: Origin of open clusters revealed by the evolution of the m_max$-$M_ecl relation
summary: Using the Gaia DR3 open cluster catalog, we identified the most massive star in each observed cluster. Examining the m_max$-$M_cluster relations across different age ranges, we find that as clusters age, the relation gradually deviates from the initial m_max$-$M_ecl relation and eventually exhibits clear age stratification. We conducted N$-$body simulations for both individual cluster evolution and subcluster coalescence. Four gas expulsion modes were tested for individual clusters, and two scenarios were modeled for cluster coalescence. Under all four gas expulsion modes, the evolution of the m_max$-$M_cluster relation follows a similar trajectory, differing mainly in evolutionary speed. The coalescence simulations show comparable behavior but align better with the observations, as both exhibit systematically lower m_max$-$M_cluster relations than individual cluster simulations. This systematically lower observed m_max$-$M_cluster relation suggests slower cluster mass loss and smaller masses for the most massive stars$-$both conditions reproduced in the coalescence simulations. Observations also show that clusters older than 5 Myr have most massive stars significantly deviating from the initial m_max$-$M_ecl relation. From this perspective, the coalescence simulations also provide a better match to the observations. In conclusion, the evolution of the m_max$-$M_ecl relation supports subcluster coalescence as a dominant pathway for open cluster formation, consistent with our previous work.

AI.tldr: 基于盖亚(Gaia) DR3疏散星团(open cluster)样本分析最大恒星质量(m_max)与星团质量(M_cluster)关系演化，发现星团合并(subcluster coalescence)模拟比单星团演化更符合观测到的m_max-M_cluster关系随年龄分层现象，支持星团合并是疏散星团形成的主要途径。
AI.background: 研究主题为利用盖亚(Gaia) DR3疏散星团(open cluster)目录探究星团最亮恒星质量(m_max)与星团总质量(M_cluster)关系的演化机制及其对星团形成途径的约束。
AI.data: 数据来源为盖亚(Gaia) DR3疏散星团目录和N体模拟(N-body simulation)数据。
AI.method: 采用N体模拟(N-body simulations)分析单个星团演化和子星团并合过程，测试了四种气体抛射模式和两种并合情景。
AI.result: 随着星团年龄增长，m_max$-$M_cluster关系逐渐偏离初始m_max$-$M_ecl关系并呈现明显年龄分层。

title: pyKurucz: A Pure Python Reimplementation of Kurucz SYNTHE for Stellar Spectrum Synthesis
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to the Journal of Open Source Software (JOSS)
